headline: Jeremy Jacquet
body: Liverpool confirm Jeremy Jacquet has joined from Rennes on a 5+1 deal. Pre-agreement all sorted in January. £55m+£5m fee.🔴
raw_text: Liverpool confirm Jeremy Jacquet has joined from Rennes on a 5+1 deal. Pre-agreement all sorted in January. £55m+£5m fee.🔴
